notes:
### v1.2.1

#### Improved
- MeowConnect now shows Sleeping when the passive Supabase realtime listener closes, instead of marking the cloud connection as Offline. On-demand uploads can still run when raid completions are synced.
- Actual MeowConnect cloud request failures and login-required states are now written to the integrated app logs under Settings > System.
- MeowConnect profile names now prefer Discord whitelist display names when available instead of falling back to raw Discord account names.
- The set-up guide now covers MeowConnect character sharing and waits for MeowConnect consent before continuing.
- Set-up guide highlighting is now less intrusive and should avoid layout and scrolling glitches.
- MeowConnect now marks unsynced local sharing changes until the next successful upload while keeping manual sync cooldown limits.
- MeowConnect logs now combine shared LOA Logs clears and show the involved profile icons together.
- Raid Together Availability now removes the redundant All filter, adds visible-raid focus filters, stacks profiles inside each raid frame, and opens character details in an overlay.
- Raid Together now lets users select which accepted friends to compare and computes the shared open-run count across the whole selected group.
- The MeowConnect title and Together tab controls now align with the centered Availability raid frames.
- Availability raid focus buttons can now select multiple raids at the same time.
- MeowConnect expanded profile overlays now show the raid name beside the profile image, with profile details underneath.

#### Added
- System settings now include a default-off frontend-only RAT view option that groups non-gold characters from all rosters in To Do without changing saved roster data.

#### Fixed
- Manual MeowConnect logs now keep separate raid gates for the same character, raid, difficulty, and source, so Gate 1 and Gate 2 can appear separately.
- Raid Together now refreshes after friend data, local snapshots, and remote snapshots load, so matching open runs appear without needing unrelated UI changes.
- MeowConnect favorite toggles and Favorites filtering now update inside availability overlays without closing the overlay.
- Shared LOA Logs clears now infer local and friend participants from players_json before grouping logs.
- Favorites view now shows member favorite counts such as 0 favorites and only lists favorited characters.
- MeowConnect now resolves remote profiles, friend rows, logs, availability, and Together matching to whitelist names instead of raw Discord names.
- Shared LOA Logs clears now dedupe by raid gate and players_json list, even if each uploaded perspective has a slightly different timestamp.
- When the optional RAT To Do view is enabled, RAT characters are hidden from normal To Do roster views and shown only in the virtual RAT view.

## Installation
Download `loatracker_1.2.1_x64-setup.exe` below.
